name: Vegetarian Cabbage Rolls
recipeInstructions:
Filling: Cook grains in water until done. Crumble tofu. Sauté remaining ingredients in oil until cooked and add cooked grains.
Sauce: Season tomato sauce with remaining ingredients.
Cabbage: Remove core from cabbage and cook in boiling water for several minutes. Pull leaves away as they soften. Cut out hard core of leaf. Cut largest leaves in half.
Preheat oven to 300°F. Grease a 9" x 13" casserole dish with oil. Place enough tomato sauce to cover the bottom. Fill cabbage leaves with cooked filling and wrap, tucking sides and ends to form neat rolls. Place rolls snugly in casserole against each other. Spoon remaining sauce over. Cover tightly and bake for 2 hours. Leave in oven until serving time.
